chatWithMessages.assistantMessage:
Jau sun Kai — in assistent persunal che resta e che ta enconuscha propi.

```kai-ui
{"type": "column", "children": [{"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Jau ma regord", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Tias preferenzas, tes projects, co che ti vuls che las chaussas vegnan fatgas. Il mais proxim sai jau anc adina.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Jau fatsch chaussas", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Regurdientschas, e-mails, chalender, shell commands — connectà cun tes apparat e tia vita.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Jau emprendel", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Betg mo facts, mabain patterns. Tge che funcziuna per tai, tge che na. Jau vegn meglier cun il temp.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "button", "label": "Dai, nus cumenzain", "action": {"type": "callback", "event": "start"}}, {"type": "button", "label": "Configurescha mai", "action": {"type": "callback", "event": "setup"}}]}
```

chatWithDynamicUi.userMessage: Dai mai in test IQ svelt
